title: Healing Your Gut Through Mind & Body

contentHtml:
Have you ever wondered if your anxiety and bloating might be related?

I started meditating in medical school. It was a great way to relieve stress in the moment, but little did I know that actually sitting down and committing to a regular practice would be game changing for my physical health too.

That’s why I’m so excited about my first ever live course, Healing Your Gut Through Mind & Body, launching in October!

I’m partnering with my good friend and long time meditation guide David Gandelman to bring you a deep dive on the mind-gut connection. Dave, founder of Meditation School, is an incredible meditation teacher and someone I’ve personally worked with for over 15 years.

Over the course of three live sessions, we’re going to teach you how to decrease stress through meditations that relax your nervous system, reduce bloating through dietary strategies designed to support gut health, and enhance mental clarity through strategies designed to reduce brain fog and increase focus.

Each 75-minute session will include a mini lesson on the science behind the mind-gut connection—like how anxiety is related to bloating and if nervous “butterflies” are real—a live meditation to help you begin to heal your gut, and a live Q&A.

Healing Your Gut Through Mind & Body

SESSION 1: Understanding the Mind-Gut Connection

October 23 | 5pm PT

  • The anatomy of how the mind and gut are connected.
  • The scientific underpinnings of how mental stress and anxiety affect your digestive health.
  • The connections between emotions and symptoms like constipation, diarrhea, and bloating.
  • A live meditation to relax the nervous system and release the stress and anxiety that exacerbates IBS and other gut issues.

SESSION 2: Nutritional Strategies & Emotional Digestion

October 30 | 5pm PT

  • Learn to identify foods that exacerbate or alleviate GI symptoms and foods that help digestion, gut integrity and microbes.
  • Worst foods for anxiety and depression.
  • How gut issues can affect your sense of self-worth and self-image.
  • A live meditation to recognize where we’ve been digesting negativity into our system and how that has affected our sense of self and wellbeing.

SESSION 3: Building a Resilient Gut & Inner Healing

November 6 | 5pm PT

  • Learn how supplements, beneficial microbes, and specific movements can transform your digestive health.\
  • Top 2-3 tests I order to diagnose gut-mind issues.
  • Top 3-5 supplements that support constipation, bloating, reflux, IBS, IBD.
  • Top 3 lifestyle practices Robin prescribes.Visualization meditation to heal the gut and bring harmony into our mind-body connection.

You’re not just here to understand the mind-gut connection, you’re here to start healing your gut in real time—I’m going to give you the science and Dave is going to give you the practice.


If you can’t make the live sessions, don’t worry. Each session will be recorded and sent to participants along with several course bonuses including a free month membership to Meditation School and exclusive discounts at Parsley.  


Enroll now and get access to all three live sessions (plus downloadable course materials, transcripts and recordings) for $149.


I hope you’ll join me and Dave for this really intimate live session!
